_note: Committed reconciliation-eval baseline (ADR-0008). The eval gate asserts no regression vs these. Update deliberately (with justification) when reconciliation behavior intentionally improves, like the golden characterization tests. UPDATED for Axis B phrase-snap (ADR-0011): the pipeline is now reconcile -> snap -> oracle. The conservative PhraseSnapper (HIGH=90, LOW=60, MARGIN=15) recovered all 3 previously not-found near-misses (filler / misheard_callsign / word_split), each scoring >=94.7 against the correct phrase with a >=20-point runner-up margin, so match went 9 -> 12 and not_found went 3 -> 0. wrong_match stayed 0 (the safety bar). abstain is 0 here because every recoverable miss in this curated set cleared the HIGH band cleanly; the abstain band populates once mid-confidence cases (LOW<=best<HIGH) enter the dataset or telemetry. UPDATED for punctuation folding in the snapper's normalizer: real operator evidence 'TACAN Air-to-Air' used to abstain (the hyphen made token_sort_ratio 75 vs the stored 'TACAN Air to Air'); folding connector punctuation to spaces restores the exact 100 match (runner-up 'TACAN Air refuel' 68.8, margin 31.2 > 15), so it snaps. Added that case (+ the two real near-miss distractors as commands), total 12 -> 13, match 12 -> 13, wrong_match still 0.
